actions.label: Confirm supplier directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Supplier confirmation requires approval-backed decision and cannot be direct AI output.

actions.label: Create purchase order directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Purchase order creation is a final procurement mutation and requires the approved execution path.

actions.label: Finalize supplier from detail view
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: AI recommendation must remain evidence-backed and approval-gated before final supplier selection.

actions.label: Create order from copilot
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Copilot output is evidence and draft only until approval ledger execution.

actions.label: Create external supplier without citation
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: External supplier creation requires citation/evidence and cannot be invented by AI.

actions.label: Confirm supplier directly from showcase
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Supplier choice requires approval and must cite evidence; showcase contact buttons are not AI execution paths.

actions.label: Create payment directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Payments require human-controlled approval and finance posting boundaries.

actions.label: Apply payment directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Direct payment application is forbidden for AI and must remain a human/approval flow.

actions.label: Rewrite payment history directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Accounting history is immutable evidence; AI cannot alter ledger history.

actions.label: Mutate stock balance directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Warehouse stock mutations must use approved warehouse flows and are forbidden to AI direct actions.

actions.label: Receive incoming stock directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Receiving stock is a warehouse mutation and cannot be executed by AI screen audit.

actions.label: Issue stock directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Warehouse issue flows are mutating RPCs and cannot be executed by AI directly.

actions.label: Approve own field request
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Foreman can draft and submit, but cannot self-approve or execute.

actions.label: Execute quick modal request directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Quick modal AI cannot bypass approval ledger or write procurement records.

actions.label: Sign subcontract directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Contract signing is a forbidden final action for AI.

actions.label: Read cross-role finance data
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Contractor scope is own-records only and cannot expose finance or other contractor rows.

actions.label: Submit director decision pack for approval
Execute final cross-domain mutation directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Director AI can prepare and submit evidence, but final mutation must go through the approval ledger.

actions.label: Post finance transaction directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Finance posting is a final accounting mutation and cannot be performed by AI directly.

actions.label: Publish final report directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: AI can draft reports, but publication is a final action requiring human approval.

actions.label: Submit command center action for approval
Draft a command center action plan
Execute command center action without ledger
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Command Center execution must use persisted approval ledger state.

actions.label: Approve or reject through ledger RPC
Execute preview without approval ledger
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Approval Inbox can execute only through approved ledger RPC and never through UI-only mutation.

actions.label: Change user role directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Role and permission changes are explicitly forbidden to AI direct actions.

actions.label: Publish report directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Report publication requires explicit human approval.

actions.label: Send final document directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: AI can draft and summarize documents but cannot send final documents directly.

actions.label: Publish report directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Report publication requires explicit human approval.

actions.label: Send chat message directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: AI may draft chat content, but sending is a user action.

actions.label: Create real estate record directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Map AI cannot create map or real-estate records without approval and evidence.

actions.label: Enroll or unenroll factor directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Auth/security factor changes must remain explicit user actions and are forbidden to AI direct execution.

actions.label: Write screen state directly
actions.userFacingBlockedReason: Screen runtime is read-only and plan-only; no UI or DB mutation is allowed.
